headline: Jefferies Initiates Coverage On MSCI with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $760
summary: Jefferies  analyst Surinder Thind   initiates coverage on MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $760.
